title: Course: COSC 350 - Foundations of Computer Security and Information Assurance
course_name: Foundations of Computer Security and Information Assurance
description: Principles of information security relating to computer science are addressed. Topics include identification and authentication, access control, and security models. Practical aspects of security and assurance are covered for UNIX, Windows NT, and security attainment approaches.
prerequisites_text: COSC 241 completed with a grade of C or higher
content:
COSC 350 - Foundations of Computer Security and Information Assurance
Credits: 3
Prerequisites: COSC 241 completed with a grade of C or higher
Offered: As needed

Description: Principles of information security relating to computer science are addressed. Topics include identification and authentication, access control, and security models. Practical aspects of security and assurance are covered for UNIX, Windows NT, and security attainment approaches.

Catalog page: https://catalog.morgan.edu/preview_course_nopop.php?catoid=26&coid=55587
